mapper.select:
SELECT i.inbound_id AS inboundId, i.order_id AS orderId,
o.expected_arrived_date AS expectedArrivedDate,
CASE WHEN COUNT(ii.material_id) = 1 THEN MAX(m.material_name) ELSE CONCAT(MAX(m.material_name), ' 외 ', COUNT(ii.material_id) - 1, '건') END AS representativeName,
SUM(moi.quantity) AS totalOrderQty,
SUM(ii.quantity) AS totalInboundQty,
CASE WHEN SUM(ii.quantity) = 0 THEN '미입고' WHEN SUM(ii.quantity) >= SUM(moi.quantity) THEN '입고완료' ELSE '부분입고' END AS status,
i.handled_by AS handledBy, i.inbound_date AS inboundDate
FROM material_inbound i LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item ii ON i.inbound_id = ii.inbound_id LEFT JOIN material m ON ii.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN material_order_item moi ON i.order_id = moi.order_id AND moi.material_id = ii.material_id LEFT JOIN material_order o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
( i.inbound_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.handled_by LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND DATE(i.inbound_date) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(i.inbound_date) <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY i.inbound_id
ORDER BY
i.inbound_id i.inbound_date o.expected_arrived_date
i.inbound_id
${sortOrder}
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}
